summary: Admin UI Restructuring - All Tests PASSED. Verified: 1) Products tab has 4 sub-tabs (Products, Categories, Promo Codes, Terms), 2) Articles tab has 5 sub-tabs (Articles, Templates, Email Templates, Categories, Override Codes), 3) Sidebar has Email Templates & References under CONTENT, Custom Domains under SETTINGS, 4) Website Content Forms only has Quote Request Form and Scope Request Form (no Bank Transaction Form), 5) Product editing works at /admin/products/:id/edit, 6) Cart spacing increased (space-y-8, gap-10)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor React warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in ProductForm - non-blocking but should be addressed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin UI restructuring complete. Products tab now contains Promo Codes and Terms as sub-tabs. Articles tab now contains Override Codes as sub-tab. Email Templates, References moved to main sidebar under CONTENT section. Custom Domains moved to main sidebar under SETTINGS section. Website Content tab no longer has Payments section. Bank Transaction Form removed from Forms section.

features_tested.details: Products, Categories, Promo Codes, Terms sub-tabs all present with icons
Articles, Templates, Email Templates, Categories, Override Codes sub-tabs all present
Email Templates tab found under CONTENT section in main sidebar
References tab found under CONTENT section in main sidebar
Custom Domains tab found under SETTINGS section in main sidebar
Only Quote Request Form (5 fields) and Scope Request Form (6 fields) present - Bank Transaction Form correctly removed
Product edit page works at /admin/products/prod_bookkeeping/edit with Save, Cancel, Back buttons
Cart.tsx uses space-y-8 and gap-10 classes for increased spacing between sections
